title: Madame Du Barry
actors: Dolores del Rio, Reginald Owen, Victor Jory
plot: Madame DuBarry is a 1934 American historical film directed by William Dieterle and starring Dolores del Rio, Reginald Owen, Victor Jory and Osgood Perkins. The film portrays the life of Madame Du Barry, the last mistress of King L...
